name_en: Top-tier original M82210 Black Full Leather Chain Bag Series M81911 Wallet On Chain Ivy Handbag made of Monogram canvas, inspired by the 2000s Sac Recoleta bag. Card slots and zippered interior pockets hold daily essentials, and the chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable for long and short shoulder or crossbody options. size:23.5x12x4.3cmD
